name: spacecode
description: SpaceCode - a single-window multi-project editor for macOS

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch" "wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist-electron/main/index.js file:dist-electron/main/preload.js file:dist-electron/main/terminal-host.js && nodemon --watch dist-electron --ext js --exec 'cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron dist-electron/main/index.js'"
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.codesign:node-pty: sh -c 'for file in node_modules/node-pty/build/Release/pty.node node_modules/node-pty/build/Release/spawn-helper; do if [ -f "$file" ]; then codesign --force --sign - "$file"; fi; done'
